samples.xml_description:
<module id="accu">
    <description>Accumulate input data and output after receiving 4 input data.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data for addition.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating readiness for new data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating when 4 input data accumulation is reached.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[9:0]">10-bit output data representing the accumulated sum.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="COUNT_WIDTH" value="2">Width of count to support $COUNT$ input data.</parameter>
        <parameter name="DATA_WIDTH" value="8">Width of input data.</parameter>
        <parameter name="ACC_DATA_WIDTH" value="9">Width of accumulated data.</parameter>
        <parameter name="COUNT_MAX" value="2">Maximum value of count for $COUNT$ input data.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="count" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[COUNT_WIDTH-1:0]">Count of input data received.</reg>
        <reg id="data_temp" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[ACC_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]">Temporary storage for accumulated data.</reg>
        <reg id="data_out_reg" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[ACC_DATA_WIDTH-1:0]">Register to hold accumulated data for output.</reg>
        <reg id="valid_out_reg" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">Register to hold valid_out signal.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <true>
                    <input id="clk">
                    <neg id="rst_n">
                        <reg id="count" assign="">
                            <binary id="0" />
                        </reg>
                        <reg id="data_temp" assign="">
                            <binary id="0" />
                        </reg>
                        <reg id="data_out_reg" assign="">
                            <binary id="0" />
                        </reg>
                        <reg id="valid_out_reg" assign="">
                            <binary id="0" />
                        </reg>
                    </neg>
                </true>
            </if>
            <else>
                <input id="valid_in">
                    <eq id="1">
                        <reg id="valid_out_reg" assign="">
                            <binary id="0" />
                        </reg>
                    </eq>
                    <neg id="0">
                        <input id="clk">
                            <if>
                                <eq id="count" value="COUNT_MAX">
                                    <compound>
                                        <reg id="count" assign="">
                                            <binary id="0" />
                                        </reg>
                                        <reg id="data_out_reg" assign="">
                                            <add>
                                                <reg id="data_temp" />
                                                <reg id="data_out_reg" />
                                            </add>
                                        </reg>
                                        <reg id="valid_out_reg" assign="">
                                            <binary id="1" />
                                        </reg>
                                    </compound>
                                </eq>
                                <else>
                                    <reg id="count" assign="">
                                        <add>
                                            <reg id="count" />
                                            <binary id="1" />
                                        </add>
                                    </reg>
                                    <reg id="data_temp" assign="">
                                        <add>
                                            <reg id="data_temp" />
                                            <input id="data_in" />
                                        </add>
                                    </reg>
                                </else>
                            </if>
                        </input>
                    </neg>
                </else>
            </else>
        </sequential>
        <assign id="valid_out">
            <reg id="valid_out_reg" />
        </assign>
        <assign id="data_out">
            <reg id="data_out_reg" />
        </assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
